Event: Cornucopia Island February 2026
Event Date: 05/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: L6
Candle of the Sea Lantern

Once in a while, a ray of light hits 3 random enemy units and blinds them for 5 sec. Blinded enemies have a 55% chance of missing their target when attacking. When a unit is hit with the ray of light, all shields and damage-reducing effects are removed from the targets, and incineration is cast upon them for 5 sec. The incinerated enemy units receive 650000 pure damage every second, and all enemies in a small radius around them receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original target. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
